tweets.text: I’m currently in China for all of March learning about the robotics ecosystem (the full stack). I’ll also be taking a short detour to Seoul from Mar 13-16. If you are working on something cool and would like to meet, please DM me. Researchers at universities and companies both welcome!
Elite ball knowledge as the kids say

I find it simply incredible that the USA is constructing so many data centers. A nation of computronium. This is such a long-term good investment.
from https://t.co/3mFr7vyPuL https://t.co/i9qffFDiv8

Have taken an interest in passive dynamics lately. Built @RussTedrake's passive walker in Mujoco for fun. 

Claude & Gemini are surprisingly bad at writing and handling Mujoco XML, I had to do a lot of it by hand.
